---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that help explain the request.
